endpoints.name: Returns all platform images.
endpoints.description: Returns a list of all platform images.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location.

endpoints.name: Returns the requested platform image.
endpoints.description: Returns the specific platform image matching publisher, offer, skus and version.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{OFFER}} with a real offer. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{PUBLISHER}} with a real publisher. Replace {{VERSION}} with a real version. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SKU}} with a real sku.

endpoints.name: Creates a platform image.
endpoints.description: Creates a new platform image with given publisher, offer, skus and version.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{OFFER}} with a real offer. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{PUBLISHER}} with a real publisher. Replace {{VERSION}} with a real version. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SKU}} with a real sku.

endpoints.name: Deletes a platform image matching publisher, offer, skus and version
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{OFFER}} with a real offer. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{PUBLISHER}} with a real publisher. Replace {{VERSION}} with a real version. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SKU}} with a real sku.
